name: Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD
summary: Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of high and low voltage electrical equipment in China. It offers prefabricated substations, insulated busducts, cable bridges, etc.; and KYN-40.5, KYN28-12, MNS, L-GGD, L-GCS, L-GCK, XGN2-12, HXGN17-12, ZNYBW, and other series of products, as well as supplies CNPC and CNOOC materials. The company also exports its products to Russia, India, Malaysia, Iran, Angola, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Shandong Luyitong Intelligent Electric Plc. and changed its name to Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD in September 2020. Sunfly Intelligent Technology Co., LTD was founded in 2003 and is based in Laiyang, China.
